code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < list.len(parts)
    let part_opt = list.get(parts, i)
    let part = match part_opt
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n_opt = string.parse_int(part)
    let n = match n_opt
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < list.len(nums)
    let val_opt = list.get(nums, j)
    let val = match val_opt
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut pos = list.len(sorted)
    mut k = 0
    while k < list.len(sorted)
      let cur_opt = list.get(sorted, k)
      let cur = match cur_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if val <= cur
        pos = k
        k = list.len(sorted)
      else
        k = k + 1
      end
    end
    mut before: List<Int> = []
    mut m = 0
    while m < pos
      let elem_opt = list.get(sorted, m)
      let elem = match elem_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      before = list.push(before, elem)
      m = m + 1
    end
    before = list.push(before, val)
    mut after: List<Int> = []
    mut n2 = pos
    while n2 < list.len(sorted)
      let elem_opt = list.get(sorted, n2)
      let elem = match elem_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      after = list.push(after, elem)
      n2 = n2 + 1
    end
    mut combined: List<Int> = before
    mut p = 0
    while p < list.len(after)
      let elem_opt = list.get(after, p)
      let elem = match elem_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      combined = list.push(combined, elem)
      p = p + 1
    end
    sorted = combined
    j = j + 1
  end
  mut result = ""
  mut q = 0
  while q < list.len(sorted)
    let elem_opt = list.get(sorted, q)
    let elem = match elem_opt
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if q == 0
      result = "#{elem}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{elem}"
    end
    q = q + 1
  end
  print(result)
  Ok(())
end
